violations.description: Mechanical cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitize solution for mechanical warewashing machine was not maintained at the proper concentration. Dish machine did not register sanitizer when checked. Chlorine sanitizers should be at 50ppm. **Will use 3 compartment sink.
General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Observed food employee put on gloves without washing hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.
